name: ddd-workshop
description: Pipeline skills that guide a developer from a vague idea to DDD aggregate design. Seven conversational skills run in sequence: project-kickoff (context and scope), domain-research (epistemic self-audit and research), requirement-clarifier (gap and contradiction hunt), ubiquitous-language-extractor (glossary and homonym detection), event-flow-mapper (solo Event Storming), bounded-context-identifier (context boundary detection), strategic-classifier (Core/Supporting/Generic), aggregate-designer (aggregates, invariants, policies). Each skill is standalone, supports partial entry, and enforces Epistemic Honesty.
